headline: Assessing CMS Energy (CMS) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness And Mixed Fair Value Signals
summary: Recent share performance and business mix CMS Energy (CMS) has drawn investor attention after a recent pullback, with the stock down 0.8% on the day, 2.6% over the past week and 4.6% over the past month. Over the past 3 months, the share price has declined 6.7%. The 1 year total return stands at 6.5%, and the longer term 3 year and 5 year total returns are 35.3% and 34.8% respectively. The company reports annual revenue of US$8.8b and net income of US$1.1b, with revenue growth of 4.6% and net...
